summary: Workflow uses pinned action refs and sensible permissions. Bash uses `set -euo pipefail` and proper quoting. TypeScript has explicit types. CRITICAL: test harness invokes `act push --input` (line 118 in run-tests.sh), but workflow_dispatch inputs are not available on push events—they only work with `act workflow_dispatch`. All three test cases will silently use 'feat-commits' fixture regardless of intent. CRITICAL: line 113 copies missing .actrc file, causing immediate failure. JSON.parse calls lack try-catch (src/main.ts:30, src/version-bumper.ts:71). Workflow duplicates Checkout+setup-bun+install across test and bump-version jobs (lines 16-26, 37-47). Redundant fixture selection logic (lines 52-57). Missing error handling in TypeScript for file I/O. Workflow structure itself is sound (good triggers, job dependency), but test harness design conflicts with push-event workflow.
